Authors and Citation

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Berends MS, Holt KE, Hawkey J, Couto N, Foster-Nyarko E, Knight GM, Dyson ZA, Tsang KK, Prasad AB, Sánchez-Busó L, Argimón S, Nagy D, Chaput DL, Goodman RN (2026). AMRgen: Genotype-Phenotype Integration for Antimicrobial Resistance Research. R package version 0.0.1.9000, https://amrgen.org. 

@Manual{,
  title = {AMRgen: Genotype-Phenotype Integration for Antimicrobial Resistance Research},
  author = {Matthijs S. Berends and Kathryn E. Holt and Jane Hawkey and Natacha Couto and Ebenezer Foster-Nyarko and Gwen M. Knight and Zoe A. Dyson and Kara K. Tsang and Arjun B. Prasad and Leonor Sánchez-Busó and Silvia Argimón and Dorottya Nagy and Dominique L. Chaput and Richard N. Goodman},

On this page

Free and Open Source (GPL-3), brought by AMRverse/AMRgen Development Team

AMRverse is an ecosystem for AMR data science. We aim to make common tasks easier and faster, via interoperable tools and resources.
